name: Old World Christmas Hamster Glass Tree Ornament, 2.75-in
description: Share the spirit of the holiday season with your hamster friend when you hang up the Old World Christmas Glass Tree Ornament. As good companions, rodents are affectionate and intelligent, and their small bodies hide how big their hearts really are! With the hand-painted, mouth-blown ornaments from Old World Christmas, your precious fur baby can become a holiday tradition in your home, hanging proudly on your holiday tree. It can be a treasured keepsake, and even a great gift for your fellow animal lovers.
